controllers.name: McpGatewayController
controllers.purpose: Handles execution and verification of developer MCP API keys, managing sessions and routing commands to backend tools safely.

controllers.name: PushNotificationController
controllers.purpose: Processes incoming notification events and formats payloads for FCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging).

controllers.name: OgPreviewController
controllers.purpose: Generates OpenGraph preview images and metadata for links shared in chat rooms or promo pages.
